<<Title Evaluation for Article>>

* The title accurately reflects the study's focus on glial coverage and its impact on synaptic efficacy.
* The abstract discusses how astrocytic coverage affects glutamate clearance and synaptic transmission.
* The title mentions "glutamate clearance" which is a key element in the abstract.
* The abstract highlights the role of astrocytic wrapping in regulating synaptic efficacy.
* The title includes "synaptic efficacy," which is directly addressed in the abstract.
* The study's main finding is that glial coverage contributes to the regulation of synaptic efficacy.
* The title is concise and captures the essence of the article's content.
* The abstract provides evidence supporting the title's claim about glial coverage.
* The title is appropriate and aligns with the abstract's main points.

*highlighted section* The title "Control of glutamate clearance and synaptic efficacy by glial coverage of neurons" is a suitable match for the article's abstract, as it encapsulates the core findings and focus of the research.

* The abstract discusses the relationship between astrocytic coverage and glutamate clearance.
* The title is well-structured and clearly communicates the study's purpose.
* The keywords "glutamate clearance" and "synaptic efficacy" are central to the title and the abstract.
* The title is precise and aligns with the abstract's main argument.
* The abstract supports the title's claim about the role of glial coverage in synaptic regulation.
* The title is an accurate representation of the article's content.
* The abstract provides a detailed analysis of the relationship between glial coverage and synaptic efficacy.
* The title effectively summarizes the study's findings.
